message:
feat(e2e): add master test orchestrator and expand TUI dashboard

- Add e2e-runner binary (34KB) with run-smoke, run-correctness,
  run-recovery, run-all, and report subcommands for unified test execution
- Expand e2e_dashboard.rs (+636/-64) with richer visualization, status
  tracking, and improved layout for monitoring long-running test suites
- Add e2e-runner binary definition to Cargo.toml

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -45,6 +45,10 @@ path = "src/bin/profile_db.rs"
 name = "e2e-dashboard"
 path = "src/bin/e2e_dashboard.rs"
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "e2e-runner"
+path = "src/bin/e2e_runner.rs"
+
 [[bench]]
 name = "e2e_bench"
 harness = false
